RegistrationInfo.Author: LED237
RegistrationInfo.Description: UAWSO (Utharsika Amazon UK Daily, Weekly and Month-to-Date Sales and Orders Report) daily automated run. Runs 05_IMPLEMENTATION\automation\run_uawso_daily.ps1 -Publish, which invokes uawso_daily_runner.py to extract fresh source data (2025-01-01 through the safe/complete end date), generate a new dated/versioned HTML report, run the pre-publication validation checklist, and publish exactly one new ph_task row - all under the mandatory Historical Output Protection policy (never overwrites/modifies any existing HTML file or ph_task row). NOT YET REGISTERED on this machine - registering an unattended ("run whether logged on or not") task requires local Administrator elevation, which the build session that produced this file did not have. See 07_EVIDENCE\automation\scheduler\scheduler_registration_notes.md for the exact blocking error and the one-line elevated command to complete registration.

Exec.WorkingDirectory: C:\Users\LED237\Documents\Projects\Weekly and Day Wise Filter monthly\05_IMPLEMENTATION\automation
